changes.value:
## What

Add a `virtual` boolean field to the tag entity so we can distinguish computed virtual tags from user-created tags. This is the foundational schema change everything else depends on.

**Files to modify:**
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/definitions/` — add new field definition `virtual.yaml` (boolean field, default false, read-only in UI)
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/tag.yaml` — add `virtual` to the fields list
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/tag/add.rs` — update `tag_entity_to_json` to include `virtual` field in output
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/tag/list.rs` — no changes needed (uses `tag_entity_to_json`)

The `virtual` field should:
- Default to `false` for existing tags
- Be read-only (no editor)
- Be included in JSON serialization via `tag_entity_to_json`
- Not appear in the tag inspector grid (no section)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `virtual` field definition exists as a boolean field
- [ ] Tag entity schema includes `virtual` in its fields list
- [ ] `tag_entity_to_json` includes `\"virtual\": true/false` in output
- [ ] Existing tags default to `virtual: false`
- [ ] `list tags` returns virtual field for each tag

## Tests
- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-kanban/tests/integration_tag_storage.rs` — add test that a newly created tag has `virtual: false`
- [ ] Unit test in `tag/add.rs` that `tag_entity_to_json` includes the virtual field
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` passes

## Workflow
- Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.

#virtual-tags
VT-1: Add `virtual` boolean field to tag entity schema

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,25 +1,51 @@
 ## What

-Add a `virtual` boolean field to the tag entity so we can distinguish computed virtual tags from user-created tags. This is the foundational schema change everything else depends on.
+Three schema changes that form the foundation:
+
+### 1. `virtual` boolean field on tag entity
+Add a `virtual` boolean field to the tag entity so we can distinguish computed virtual tags from user-created tags.
+
+### 2. `virtual_tags` computed field on task entity
+A new display-only field that shows virtual tags as a badge list. Separate from `tags` so the existing body-parsed tag editor is untouched.
+
+### 3. `filter_tags` hidden field on task entity
+The union of `tags` + `virtual_tags`. No display, no editor — pure data for backend filtering (`list tasks --tag`, `next task --tag`).
+
+**Files to create:**
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/definitions/virtual.yaml` — boolean field, default false, no editor
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/definitions/virtual_tags.yaml` — computed field:
+  ```yaml
+  type:
+    kind: computed
+    entity: tag
+    commit_display_names: true
+  display: badge-list
+  editor: none
+  section: header
+  ```
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/definitions/filter_tags.yaml` — hidden computed field:
+  ```yaml
+  type:
+    kind: computed
+    entity: tag
+    commit_display_names: true
+  display: none
+  editor: none
+  ```

 **Files to modify:**
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/definitions/` — add new field definition `virtual.yaml` (boolean field, default false, read-only in UI)
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/tag.yaml` — add `virtual` to the fields list
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/tag.yaml` — add `virtual` to fields list
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/task.yaml` — add `virtual_tags` and `filter_tags` to fields list
 - `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/tag/add.rs` — update `tag_entity_to_json` to include `virtual` field in output
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/tag/list.rs` — no changes needed (uses `tag_entity_to_json`)
-
-The `virtual` field should:
-- Default to `false` for existing tags
-- Be read-only (no editor)
-- Be included in JSON serialization via `tag_entity_to_json`
-- Not appear in the tag inspector grid (no section)

 ## Acceptance Criteria
 - [ ] `virtual` field definition exists as a boolean field
 - [ ] Tag entity schema includes `virtual` in its fields list
+- [ ] `virtual_tags` field definition exists with `display: badge-list`, `editor: none`
+- [ ] `filter_tags` field definition exists with no display, no editor
+- [ ] Task entity schema includes `virtual_tags` and `filter_tags` in its fields list
 - [ ] `tag_entity_to_json` includes `\"virtual\": true/false` in output
 - [ ] Existing tags default to `virtual: false`
-- [ ] `list tags` returns virtual field for each tag

 ## Tests
 - [ ] `swissarmyhammer-kanban/tests/integration_tag_storage.rs` — add test that a newly created tag has `virtual: false`

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,30 +1,31 @@
 ## What

-Three schema changes that form the foundation:
-
-### 1. `virtual` boolean field on tag entity
-Add a `virtual` boolean field to the tag entity so we can distinguish computed virtual tags from user-created tags.
+With Option B (virtual tags are NOT entities), the tag entity schema is untouched. We only need two new fields on the task entity.

-### 2. `virtual_tags` computed field on task entity
-A new display-only field that shows virtual tags as a badge list. Separate from `tags` so the existing body-parsed tag editor is untouched.
+### 1. `virtual_tags` — display-only field
+Shows computed virtual tags as a badge list alongside the editable `tags` field. Set by the enrichment pipeline, not by a derive handler (enrichment has the full task list context).

-### 3. `filter_tags` hidden field on task entity
-The union of `tags` + `virtual_tags`. No display, no editor — pure data for backend filtering (`list tasks --tag`, `next task --tag`).
+### 2. `filter_tags` — hidden union field
+`tags ∪ virtual_tags`. No display, no editor. Used only for backend filtering (`list tasks --tag`, `next task --tag`).

 **Files to create:**
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/definitions/virtual.yaml` — boolean field, default false, no editor
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/definitions/virtual_tags.yaml` — computed field:
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/definitions/virtual_tags.yaml`:
   ```yaml
+  name: virtual_tags
+  description: Computed virtual tags based on task state
   type:
     kind: computed
     entity: tag
     commit_display_names: true
+  icon: zap
   display: badge-list
   editor: none
   section: header
   ```
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/definitions/filter_tags.yaml` — hidden computed field:
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/definitions/filter_tags.yaml`:
   ```yaml
+  name: filter_tags
+  description: Union of tags and virtual_tags for filtering
   type:
     kind: computed
     entity: tag
@@ -34,23 +35,20 @@
   ```

 **Files to modify:**
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/tag.yaml` — add `virtual` to fields list
 - `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/fields/entities/task.yaml` — add `virtual_tags` and `filter_tags` to fields list
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/tag/add.rs` — update `tag_entity_to_json` to include `virtual` field in output

+**No changes to tag entity schema.** No `virtual` boolean field. Tag CRUD commands untouched.
+
 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] `virtual` field definition exists as a boolean field
-- [ ] Tag entity schema includes `virtual` in its fields list
 - [ ] `virtual_tags` field definition exists with `display: badge-list`, `editor: none`
-- [ ] `filter_tags` field definition exists with no display, no editor
-- [ ] Task entity schema includes `virtual_tags` and `filter_tags` in its fields list
-- [ ] `tag_entity_to_json` includes `\"virtual\": true/false` in output
-- [ ] Existing tags default to `virtual: false`
+- [ ] `filter_tags` field definition exists with `display: none`, `editor: none`
+- [ ] Task entity schema includes both new fields
+- [ ] Tag entity schema is unchanged
+- [ ] Existing tests pass with no regression

 ## Tests
-- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-kanban/tests/integration_tag_storage.rs` — add test that a newly created tag has `virtual: false`
-- [ ] Unit test in `tag/add.rs` that `tag_entity_to_json` includes the virtual field
-- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` passes
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` passes (no regressions from new field defs)
+- [ ] `pnpm --filter kanban-app-ui test` passes (new fields don't break UI)

 ## Workflow
 - Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
